# ListRestart

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ListRestart;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ListRestart { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
reset, refresh, reload, playlist, replay

## Categories
multimedia, text

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/list-restart)
